requirement.description: The system shall periodically transmit its operational mode to the display controller at a fixed interval.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify that the Gateway periodically transmits the GatewayMode signal on the CAN bus.
Verify GatewayMode value consistency across periodic messages.
test_cases.expected_result: GatewayMode remains constant across all messages

test_cases.test_objective: Verify fixed transmission interval of Gateway_Status.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s05_003(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GATEWAY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    ts = extract_timestamps(msgs)
    intervals = [ts[i+1]-ts[i] for i in range(len(ts)-1)]
    avg = sum(intervals)/len(intervals)
    for iv in intervals:
        assert abs(iv-avg) <= MAX_INTERVAL_TOLERANCE

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GatewayMode transmission after ignition cycle.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s05_004(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GATEWAY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_gateway_mode(msgs[-1]) in range(0,8)

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GatewayMode transmission under vehicle motion.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s05_005(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GATEWAY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_gateway_mode(msgs[-1]) in range(0,8)

test_cases.expected_result: GatewayMode value deterministic for identical conditions

test_cases.test_objective: Verify GatewayMode transmission does not stop during other CAN traffic load.
preconditions: High CAN traffic generated via CAPL
test_cases.expected_result: Gateway_Status continues periodic transmission without interruption
